long_description:
NRE were alerted of link between bas28b.sr01.wdc06 Et28/1 <-> bcr01b.wdc06 Et16/1 going down. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19690
short_description: bas28b.sr01.wdc06 Et28/1 <-> bcr01b.wdc06 Et16/1 | Link Down
close_notes: Link shut to mitigate any further impact. Will proceed to do Layer1 troubleshooting to resolve any issues with the link before adding it back to service. (Note: This incident was resolved via automation.)
